ground_truth.title: Men's Wool Runner - Natural Grey (Light Grey Sole)
ground_truth.main_content:
Men's Wool Runner

THE DETAILS

A true original, our Wool Runner combines soft Merino wool with cloud-like comfort.

MATERIALLY BETTER

Our responsibly-sourced Merino wool provides a cozy fit that's soft and itch-free on the inside and durable on the outside, while a sugarcane-based SweetFoam midsole offers cushy support for all-day wear.

WASH & CARE

This shoe is washing machine approved. Just remove the insoles and laces and hand wash them separately to keep every step as fresh as the first.

BEHIND THE DESIGN

Classic Casual
From trips to the store, dinner with friends, or just taking a walk, consider this your everyday go-to.

SOFT WOOL
Superfine fibers have a luxurious feel and help regulate temperature.

ODOR MINIMIZING
Naturally anti-microbial, wool locks away moisture to maximize freshness.

SUPPORTIVE
Our proprietary sugarcane-based SweetFoam midsole is both sturdy and super soft.

RESPONSIBLY SOURCED
Our wool meets high standards of animal welfare, environmental care, and social sustainability.
